title: phaseolus unguiculatus
intro: Phaseolus unguiculatus, also known as black-eyed pea or cowpea, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Phaseolus unguiculatus include its ability to act as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help in reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of consuming Phaseolus unguiculatus include reducing the risk of heart disease, managing blood sugar levels, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Phaseolus unguiculatus include making a tea by infusing the leaves or seeds in hot water, and also using the seeds as a powder or capsule for medicinal purposes.
